## `packages/adapter-dotnet/package.json`

### Purpose
Package manifest for `@debugmcp/adapter-dotnet` (v0.22.0) — the .NET/C# debug adapter plugin for the MCP debugger system, backed by `netcoredbg`.

### Package Identity (L2–5)
- **Name:** `@debugmcp/adapter-dotnet`
- **Version:** `0.22.0`
- **Module type:** ESM (`"type": "module"`)

### Entry Points (L6–7)
- **Runtime entry:** `dist/index.js`
- **TypeScript types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
- Both are generated by `tsc -b` from source.

### Published Files (L8–11)
- `dist/` — compiled TypeScript output
- `tools/` — likely contains helper scripts or netcoredbg-related tooling (e.g., install/discovery utilities)

### Scripts (L12–18)
| Script | Command | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `build` | `tsc -b` | Incremental TypeScript project build |
| `build:ci` | `tsc -b -f` | Force full rebuild (CI environments) |
| `clean` | `rimraf dist && rimraf tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` | Remove build artifacts |
| `test` | `vitest run` | Run tests once |
| `test:watch` | `vitest watch` | Run tests in watch mode |

### Dependencies (L19–23)
- **`@debugmcp/shared`** (`workspace:*`) — shared utilities/types from the monorepo; consumed at runtime
- **`@vscode/debugprotocol`** (`^1.68.0`) — DAP (Debug Adapter Protocol) type definitions from VS Code
- **`which`** (`^7.0.0`) — resolves executable paths (likely used to locate `netcoredbg` on PATH)

### Dev Dependencies (L24–29)
- `@types/node` (`^26.1.1`), `@types/which` (`^3.0.4`) — Node.js and `which` typings
- `typescript` (`^5.9.3`) — TypeScript compiler
- `vitest` (`^4.1.10`) — test runner

### Peer Dependencies (L33–35)
- **`@debugmcp/shared`: `0.22.0`** — exact version peer; consumers must provide this package. Pinned to the same version as this package, indicating tight coupling with the monorepo release cycle.

### Engine Constraint (L30–32)
- **Node.js `>=22.0.0`** — requires modern Node; leverages latest ESM/module features.

### Repository (L36–40)
- GitHub: `https://github.com/debugmcp/mcp-debugger.git`
- Monorepo subdirectory: `packages/adapter-dotnet`

### Publish Config (L41–43)
- `"access": "public"` — published as a public npm scoped package.

### Architectural Notes
- Follows a monorepo workspace pattern (`workspace:*` dependency resolution via pnpm/yarn).
- The `tools/` directory being included in published files (L10) suggests this package ships runtime tooling (e.g., netcoredbg download/install scripts) alongside compiled code.
- Peer-dep version is pinned exactly (`0.22.0`), not a range — this means adapter and shared must always be updated together.
- No `lint` or `format` scripts defined; these are likely inherited from the workspace root.
